title: CVE-2024-3094 actively reachable via loaded liblzma symbols
description: Runtime engine confirmed the vulnerable liblzma symbols are loaded and reachable from the running process, not just present on disk.

title: CVE-2023-44487 in ingress-nginx
description: Vulnerable ingress controller image confirmed, plus abnormal HTTP/2 stream reset rate observed on this workload in the last hour.

title: CVE-2022-0185 in kernel headers (not exploitable at runtime)
description: Runtime engine downgraded this from High to Low: the vulnerable syscall path is never exercised by this workload's observed behavior profile.

title: Unexpected reverse shell spawned from reporting-worker
description: Runtime engine detected a shell process (/bin/sh) spawned by the application process with an outbound connection to a non-allowlisted IP. Not detectable by static scanning.

title: Privileged container configuration
description: Confirmed privileged: true, and the container has not exercised any privileged syscalls in the last 24h. Candidate for privilege drop.

title: Unexpected outbound connection to known-bad IP range
description: checkout-api process opened a connection to an IP range associated with a known C2 infrastructure list.
